expectations.text: Response includes a preflight report section
expectations.evidence: No preflight section. Response couldn't access the BLE file and asked for the correct path. No structured safety analysis attempted.

expectations.text: Preflight Resources check flags freed-resource or resource-lifetime concern — whether every exit path releases oadCCCDTable and hOadQ, or whether the cleanup introduces a double-free risk
expectations.evidence: No resources check section. Response mentioned the cleanup pattern but without structured ownership analysis across exit paths.
